title: Malstone
description: extends Malum and adds some items about it.
body:
This is a mod that extends Malum and adds some items about it.

For example, the "deadly knife" or "square body" of a white tin object：

These items can be made during the player's survival period

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4af28f9566e536e3ebbf809a3ecb6f205b8dfcf2.png)

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32c89e9b32af6f6de16caa1aa3de442606271c95.png)

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4082a28c98d21f24117216047ebd3f17cf904b8.png)

In the future, this mod will add more Malum related accessories
